# src

Source directory for `attractor-dot` crate. Implements winnow-based parser for strict Graphviz `digraph` subset, converting DOT source into typed `DotGraph` AST for Attractor pipeline definitions. Handles node/edge/subgraph declarations, attribute blocks with qualified keys, C++-style comments, and edge chain expansion.

## Contents

- [ast.rs](./ast.rs) вЂ” AST type definitions: `DotGraph`, `NodeDef`, `EdgeDef`, `SubgraphDef`, `AttributeValue` enum (variants `String`, `Integer(i64)`, `Float(f64)`, `Boolean(bool)`, `Duration`), using `crate::duration_serde` for `Duration` serialization.
- [duration_serde.rs](./duration_serde.rs) вЂ” Serde adapters for `std::time::Duration`. `serialize` outputs `{}ms` template via `as_millis()`. `parse_duration_str` accepts suffixes `ms`, `s`, `m`, `h`, `d` with multipliers 1, 1, 60, 3600, 86400 respectively.
- [lib.rs](./lib.rs) вЂ” Crate entry point. Exports `ast` module, `duration_serde` module, and `parse` function returning `Result<DotGraph, AttractorError>`. Documents critical behavioral contract regarding quoted duration strings.
- [parser.rs](./parser.rs) вЂ” Winnow-based DOT parser. `parse` strips comments via `strip_comments`, invokes `parse_digraph`, maps error offsets to `(line, col)` via `offset_to_line_col`. `merge_statements` folds statements into final AST, expanding edge chains and applying default attribute inheritance.

## Stack

- Rust crate `attractor-dot` (workspace member)
- `winnow` parser combinators for lexer-free grammar implementation
- `std::time::Duration` for temporal attribute values
- Serde for structured attribute serialization

## Behavioral Contracts

**Duration Formats**

- Serialization template: `{}ms` (milliseconds only)
- Parsing suffixes: `ms` (Г—1), `s` (Г—1), `m` (Г—60), `h` (Г—3600), `d` (Г—86400)

**Type Parsing Patterns**

- Identifier: `[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*`
- Qualified ID: `identifier ( '.' identifier )+`
- Float: `(opt(alt(('-', '+'))), digit1, '.', digit1)`
- Integer: `(opt(alt(('-', '+'))), digit1)`

**Quoted Duration Handling**
Quoted strings matching duration syntax (e.g., `"20m"`, `"500ms"`) parse as `AttributeValue::String`, not `AttributeValue::Duration`. Downstream must explicitly invoke `parse_duration_str` for conversion.

**Error Messages**

- `strict` prefix rejected: `'digraph' keyword (strict graphs are not supported)`
- Undirected `graph` rejected: `'digraph' keyword (undirected graphs are not supported)`
- `--` operator rejected: `only directed edges (->); undirected edges (--) are not supported`

**Comment Processing**
`strip_comments` removes `//` line and `/* */` block comments while preserving newlines to maintain line number alignment for `offset_to_line_col` error reporting.

**Edge Chain Expansion**
Syntax `A -> B -> C` expands to pairwise `EdgeDef` entries `(A,B)` and `(B,C)` in `merge_statements`, sharing the statement's attribute set.

**Attribute Default Inheritance**
`node [attr=val]` and `edge [attr=val]` statements apply to subsequent node/edge definitions within scope; inherited by subgraphs via `parent_node_defaults`/`parent_edge_defaults` parameters in `merge_statements`.

## API Surface

- `parse(input: &str) -> Result<DotGraph, AttractorError>` вЂ” Entry point exposed in `lib.rs` and implemented in `parser.rs`
- `ast` module вЂ” Exports `DotGraph`, `NodeDef`, `EdgeDef`, `SubgraphDef`, `AttributeValue`
- `duration_serde` module вЂ” Exports `serialize`, `deserialize`, `parse_duration_str(s: &str) -> Result<Duration, AttractorError>`
- `AttractorError::ParseError { line, col, ... }` вЂ” 1-indexed position reporting on syntax failures

## Architecture

Input pipeline: `parse` в†’ `strip_comments` (newline-preserving) в†’ `parse_digraph` (winnow combinators for identifiers, strings, values, statements) в†’ `merge_statements` (edge chain expansion, default inheritance, implicit node creation) в†’ `DotGraph` AST.

Error handling: `offset_to_line_col(original, remaining_len, stripped_len)` computes 1-indexed `(line, col)` by comparing original source against stripped text (newline-preserved).

## File Relationships

- `parser.rs` imports AST types via `crate::ast::*` and constructs `DotGraph` instances
- `ast.rs` references `crate::duration_serde` for `AttributeValue::Duration` variant
- `lib.rs` re-exports `ast` and `duration_serde` modules, exposing `parse` as public interface
- `AttractorError` type imported from external crate (see workspace `crates/attractor-types/`)
